title: ImmortalShields
description: This plugin lets you combine a shield and a totem in an anvil, adding "Totem Charges" that save you from death when in offhand, also providing a shield block!
body:
# ImmortalShields

## Youtube Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QqcklwyCnUQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Description
ImmortalShields is a mod that lets you add a totem to a shield in an anvil as a "**Charge**", and combine both a totem and a shield in one hand!

Though... it comes with a **price**.

## Catch

When you make your shield **charged** using totems in an anvil, you cant go back, and you have to **constantly** charge up your shield, or else...

If you run out of charges, your shield **BREAKS**. (wasnt this dramatic huh)
Also it uses x2 durability up so u have to constantly mend ur shield.

## Config

```charges.max:``` - adds a cap to charge amount (default is 10)

```anvil.level-cost-per-charge:``` - required amount of xp to add a charge (default is 5)

```item.name:``` - adds a name to the shield on first charging (default is **"The Immortal Shield"**) 

```item.rename-on-first-upgrade:``` - decides if ```item.name``` works (default is true)

```item.lore:``` - custom lore (charge amount when u hover over the shield)


effects are set to normal totem effect but u can change.

same applies to messages

# Thanks for downloading!
